title: Microsoft tests modern Windows Run, says it's faster than legacy dialog
description: Microsoft has confirmed that Windows 11 is getting a new modern Run dialog with dark mode support and faster performance in a new preview build. [...]
author: Mayank Parmar

title: Edu tech firm Instructure discloses cyber incident, probes impact
description: Instructure, the company behind the widely used Canvas learning platform, has disclosed that it recently suffered a cybersecurity incident and is now investigating its impact. [...]
author: Lawrence Abrams

title: 15-year-old detained over French govt agency data breach
description: French authorities have detained a 15-year-old suspected of selling data stolen in a cyberattack on France Titres (ANTS), the country's agency for issuing and managing administrative documents. [...]
author: Ionut Ilascu

title: Story retracted
description: BleepingComputer initially published a story about a new data breach at Instructure. Shortly after publication, we determined that the information was incorrect and primarily based on outdated details from a prior incident. The article has been retracted, and we regret the error. [...]
author: BleepingComputer

title: Criminal IP and Securonix ThreatQ Collaborate to Enhance Threat Intelligence Operations
description: Raw threat intel isn't enough without real-world context. Criminal IP has partnered with Securonix to integrate exposure-based intelligence into ThreatQ, automating analysis and speeding up investigations. [...]
author: Sponsored by Criminal IP

title: Microsoft fixes Remote Desktop warnings displaying incorrectly
description: Microsoft has fixed a known issue causing newly introduced Windows security warnings to display incorrectly when opening Remote Desktop (.rdp) files. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: Microsoft now lets admins choose pre-installed Store apps to uninstall
description: Microsoft has updated a Windows 11 in-box app removal policy introduced in October to include a dynamic list that lets IT admins choose which preinstalled Store apps to uninstall. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: Windows 11 KB5083631 update released with 34 changes and fixes
description: Microsoft has released the KB5083631 optional cumulative update for Windows 11, which includes 34 changes, such as a new Xbox mode for Windows PCs, enhanced security and performance for batch files, and performance improvements for launching startup apps. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: US ransomware negotiators get 4 years in prison over BlackCat attacks
description: Two former employees of cybersecurity incident response companies Sygnia and DigitalMint were sentenced to four years in prison each for targeting U.S. companies in BlackCat (ALPHV) ransomware attacks. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan
